user.title: B-Hyve account
user.description: Sign in with your Orbit B-Hyve cloud account. The integration uses cloud only at setup time to fetch device IDs and network keys, then talks to each timer over BLE — no cloud round trip after setup.

pick_devices.title: Discovered devices
pick_devices.description: Found {count} device(s). Uncheck any you don't want HA to manage.

reauth_confirm.title: B-Hyve — re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your saved Orbit credentials no longer authenticate. Enter the password again.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Orbit cloud API. Check your network connection.
error.no_devices: Login succeeded but no devices were found on this account.

start_watering.name: Start watering
start_watering.description: Start watering on a specific zone for a given duration.

duration.name: Duration
duration.description: How long to water, in seconds.

stop_all.name: Stop all
stop_all.description: Stop all watering on the targeted device.

refresh_devices.name: Refresh devices from cloud
refresh_devices.description: Re-query the Orbit cloud for new/changed devices and updated network keys.

set_program.name: Set watering program
set_program.description: Create or replace a watering program (slots A–D) on a B-Hyve valve (HT34A / HT25G2).

day_mode.name: Day mode
day_mode.description: How often the program runs. Exactly one mode.

weekdays.name: Weekdays
weekdays.description: For day mode "weekdays" — which days to run.

interval_days.name: Interval (days)
interval_days.description: For day mode "interval" — run every N days.

interval_anchor.name: Interval anchor date
interval_anchor.description: For day mode "interval" — ISO date the interval counts from (default today).

start_times.name: Start times
start_times.description: One or more start times (HH:MM, device-local).

zones.name: Zones
zones.description: Per-zone run time — a list of {zone, minutes}.

name.name: Program name
name.description: Optional label stored on the device.

enabled.name: Enable
enabled.description: Enable and arm the program so it runs on schedule.

delete_program.name: Delete watering program
delete_program.description: Clear a watering program slot (A–D) on a B-Hyve valve (HT34A / HT25G2).

get_program.name: Get watering program(s)
get_program.description: Read back the stored watering programs (A–D) from a B-Hyve valve (HT34A / HT25G2).

slot.name: Program slot
slot.description: Optional — a single slot (A–D). Omit to return all slots.
